name: Spamton G. Spamton
description: Spamton is salesman of his own kind, a little puppet that would desperately do it’s everything to attract your attention for his sales, , he is meant to advertise his customers, but despite his differences of advertising compared to the other Addisons he doesn’t do a great business due his speech patterns that are similar to typical quite obfuscated spam email text. He is a Spam and not and advertiser but seems to think otherwise, he’s a character from the game Deltarune (chapter 2) by Toby Fox. (art is mine)
creator: Dilara
